name: web
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project web --web

_comments.purpose: Nx project configuration for the Drawnix web application
_comments.description: This configuration defines the web app as an Nx application project within the monorepo
_comments.sourceRoot: Specifies where the source code is located relative to the project root
_comments.projectType: Defines this as an 'application' rather than a 'library' for proper Nx tooling
_comments.tags: Currently empty but can be used for project categorization and dependency rules
_comments.targets: Build, test, serve, and other executable tasks are defined here (currently managed externally)
_comments.schema: Points to Nx schema for IntelliSense and validation in IDEs
